headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) Turning Auto Parts Delivery Into Its Next Logistics Growth Engine?
summary: AutoParts.com Inc. recently brought its catalog of hundreds of thousands of auto parts live on the DoorDash Marketplace, using geo-located inventory and a national network of local retailers to support rapid last mile delivery across participating locations. This collaboration pushes DoorDash further beyond restaurant delivery into time-sensitive retail categories, positioning its logistics network as a broader same-day fulfillment platform for complex, non-food products. We’ll now examine...
